title: ColPali Family Overview | Qdrant Multi-Vector Search
summary: The ColPali family includes compact embedding models (ColSmol, ColFlor, ColModernVBERT) for visual document retrieval with reduced parameters compared to the base ColPali. Multilingual variants from NVIDIA and Nomic AI are available, and ViDoRe V3 serves as the benchmark for evaluating visual retrieval models. Qdrant is a vector search engine in Rust supporting semantic and hybrid search.
